CookcmSqueezeBloodFromTurnip.com Attorneys for Plaintiff ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC., a Delaware corporation

Hearing is held. Discussed not argued. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is Granted.

Plaintiff's counsel to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk; W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Jul-23-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Michael U. Reid aka Michael Udall Reid aka Michael U. Reid, DDS and Michael U. Reid DDS PLLC (Professional Limited Liability Company) DBA Graf Orthodontics.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:45:25 a.m. and concluding at 9:58:58 a.m. (D505)

David Julian Cook, Esq. representing Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.
Defendant Michael U. Reid aka Michael Udall Reid aka Michael U. Reid, DDS and Michael U. Reid DDS PLLC (Professional Limited Liability Company) DBA Graf Orthodontics not appearing.
Marco Padilla, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Court examines witness.
Witness testifies.
Counsel confirms that statements and declarations made are true and correct. Counsel confirms that the judgment shall resolve the entire action.

Court does not find cause to grant pre-judgment interest and denies the request.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:

Damages $113,619.89
Pre-Judgment Interest at 0% $0
Costs $0
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Other $0
Total Judgment $114,619.89

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Continued To Jun-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
